caption: A woman with dark hair and black-rimmed glasses is speaking against a plain, dark grey background. She wears a light green tunic featuring red and dark blue embroidery around the neckline and a simple dark necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to her garment. In the bottom left corner of each frame, a logo and the text "NPTEL" are visible. As the sequence progresses, the woman's facial expressions and gestures change while she continues to speak. In the early frames, she maintains a relatively neutral posture. As time passes, she begins to use her hands to emphasize her points, raising her right hand in a gesturing motion that becomes more pronounced toward the end of the sequence. Her gaze remains directed forward, and her mouth is open throughout, indicating active speech.
